response:
The serum and follicular fluid (FF) levels of 25OH-VD, as well as FF levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC, were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader.

*   Human serum 25-OHVD levels were measured with an ELISA kit (Catalog No. [REDACTED], [REDACTED] Inc., [REDACTED]) using a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
*   Human serum TNF-α levels were measured with an ELISA kit (Catalog No. [REDACTED], [REDACTED] Inc., [REDACTED]) using a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
*   Human serum TAC levels were measured with an ELISA kit (Catalog No. [REDACTED], [REDACTED] Inc., [REDACTED]) using a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
